_rolesNote: staffRoleId is used for permission checks throughout the bot. adminRoleId is for admin-only features.
_ticketsNote: supportCategoryId is the category where ticket channels are created. ticketCategoryId is an alias — set both to the same value.
_loggingNote: logChannelId receives action/moderation logs. joinGateChannelId receives join/leave logs.
_welcomeNote: welcomeChannelId is where the welcome message is sent on member join.
_forumsNote: staffForumChannelId and suggestionForumChannelId must be Discord Forum channel IDs (not text channels).
_staffForumNote: Set to the ID of the forum channel for staff applications. Must be a forum channel not a text channel.
_suggestionForumNote: Set to the ID of the forum channel for suggestions. Must be a forum channel not a text channel.
_resourcesNote: Set resourcesChannelId to the channel where resource releases are posted. Set resourcesPingRoleId to the role to ping.
_updatesNote: updatesChannelId and updatesPingRoleId control where website update announcements go. updateChannelId and updatePingRoleId are aliases.
_rolePanelNote: rolePanelChannelId is where the /role-panel command posts.
_notificationRolesNote: These three roles are toggled by the role panel and about panel select menu.
_appRolesNote: communityTeamRoleId and betaTesterRoleId are assigned on application acceptance. betaRoleId is an alias for betaTesterRoleId.
